anchors.adjudicator_context_note: anchor candidates carry null path/line, so each non-golden-matched comment was adjudicated with the full PR diff (capped at 30000 chars, truncation marked) as context rather than a sliced hunk; head-file +/-5-line context unavailable (anchor PRs not checked out). Symmetric three-bucket, blind to tool identity.

judge_sd.note: k=5 identical re-scorings of run subset-20260718-031746-27875ca fixed candidates under claude-opus-4-5-20251101 temp 0: byte-identical results every pass — judge+adjudicator pipeline is deterministic.

notes._about: Frozen scoring baselines for the bench harness (spec H7 register). judge_pin/adjudicator_pin are resolved once by resolve_judge_pin(); score_run() refuses to run while judge_pin is null. Read-only to any optimizing loop.
notes.noise_rate_se_extension_criterion: RESEARCH_PENDING: extend baseline N=3 -> N=5 if noise-rate SE at N=3 > 2pp (artifact 32).
notes.subset_full_tracking_acceptance: RESEARCH_PENDING: default is rank-order preserved on the full-50 pass with no bucket inverting by >1 SD (artifact 32).
notes.power_analysis_subset_size: RESEARCH_PENDING: power-analysis refinement of the 15-PR subset size (artifact 32).
notes.delta_noise: Signed 2026-07-18 (owner: proceed with everything except the merge). Derivation: baseline noise mean 0.1636 + 1.5 x binomial SE 0.050 (55 candidates, N=1, judge_sd=0). Provisional until between-run variance exists (v3 era); a scored run whose noise_rate exceeds 0.24 fails the gate.
notes.judge_pin_resolution: Final resolution 2026-07-17, superseding the brief claude-opus-4-8 alias pin: spec H5/Q7 requires Opus 4.8 dated + temp 0, which is jointly unsatisfiable — (1) no dated 4.8 id exists (models API verified complete), and (2) the 4.7/4.8/Sonnet-5/Fable-5 family rejects the temperature param (HTTP 400 'temperature is deprecated for this model'), while the vendored scorer (step2_5/step3) and the frozen adjudicator hardcode temperature=0. Pinned claude-opus-4-5-20251101: dated, temp-0-accepting, the judge upstream used for its committed results, and validated end-to-end by our exact spot-check reproduction (sentry#77754, deltas 0). Owner may still override before the Task 18 freeze; caches are pin-keyed.

delta_noise_proposed.derivation: noise_mean 0.1636 + 1.5 x binomial SE 0.050 (55 candidates); provisional — judge_sd=0 and N=1 leave no between-run variance; owner sign-off pending

baseline_v2.note: Owner-amended protocol 2026-07-18: N=1 (runs 2-3, extension, and full-50 tracking dropped under budget cap); k=5 judge re-scores deterministic.

protected.note: git tree SHAs at final freeze 2026-07-18, post review-hardening (recompute: git rev-parse <commit>:bench/<dir>); baselines.json protected by review, not self-reference
